Looping a video to fit over an audio file

ffmpeg  -stream_loop -1 -i 1.mp4 -c copy -v 0 -f nut - | ffmpeg -thread_queue_size 10K -i - -i 1.mp3 -c copy -map 0:v -map 1:a -shortest -y out.mp4

Sources

  • https://video.stackexchange.com/a/23394
NOTE: A bunch of links around the site are dead. I'm working on fixing them!
